response_text:
ENTITY Client
PK client_id
ATTR client_id : varchar : PK
ATTR client_name : varchar

ENTITY Order
PK order_id
ATTR order_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_id : varchar : FK
ATTR registration_date : date

ENTITY WorkCenter
PK work_center_id
ATTR work_center_id : integer : PK

ENTITY Operation
PK operation_id
ATTR operation_id : varchar : PK

ENTITY Material
PK material_id
PK material_code
ATTR material_id : varchar : PK
ATTR material_code : integer : PK

ENTITY OperationExecution
PK execution_id
ATTR execution_id : integer : PK
ATTR order_id : integer : FK
ATTR operation_id : varchar : FK
ATTR material_id : varchar : FK
ATTR material_code : integer : FK
ATTR work_center_id : integer : FK
ATTR start_datetime : datetime
ATTR quantity : float

REL Order -> Client : 0..N -> 1 : FK=client_id
REL OperationExecution -> Order : 0..N -> 1 : FK=order_id
REL OperationExecution -> Operation : 0..N -> 1 : FK=operation_id
REL OperationExecution -> Material : 0..N -> 1 : FK=material_id
REL OperationExecution -> WorkCenter : 0..N -> 1 : FK=work_center_id
